## Checklist

- [ ] Tests pass: `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -q`
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change where it makes sense
- [ ] Updated docs (README / COMMANDS.md) if behaviour or options changed
- [ ] Commits are signed off (`git commit -s`) and I agree to the [CLA](../CLA.md)
- [ ] Scanners stay conservative about false positives; remediation stays
      approval-gated and transactional (no regression to either)
